{{Quote|Commander Stratus, Count Dooku sends his regards. We are at your command. We are designed to disassemble over eleven thousand sentient species.|Assassin droid A71, reporting for duty during the Battle of Jabiim|<ref name="Republic 57">[[Republic 57|''Republic'' 57]]</ref>}}
'''A71''' was the designation of an [[A-series assassin droid]] used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Battle of Jabiim]]. It was specially modified for service on [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]], presumably adapted to the planet's perpetual rainstorms.

These droids most notably killed [[Tae Diath]], the first of the [[Padawan Pack]] to die in combat. Due to a mental link with [[Elora Sund]], made to keep him calm and in control, they also were responsible for her demise from the psychic backlash.
